home.title: Chase's CV
home.description: Chase's personal website for product-minded frontend work, interaction experiments, and design systems.

magicCursor.title: Magic Cursor | Chase's CV
magicCursor.description: Explore configurable cursor effects with live previews and copyable magic-cursor-effect code.

imageToUi.title: Image to UI | Chase's CV
imageToUi.description: Extract a color palette from an image, choose three colors, and preview a generated interface theme.

notFound.title: Page not found | Chase's CV
notFound.description: The page you are looking for could not be found.

home.eyebrow: A personal site built around shadow as a visual language
home.intro: I'm Chase. I focus on making products feel smoother: clearer hierarchy, calmer motion, better shadows, and more intentional spacing. This site collects my projects, experience, and notes.
home.expectValue: A resume homepage that feels more like a product
home.workDescription: Placeholder for project cards using the same shadow system.
home.aboutDescription: Placeholder for experience, skills, and a timeline.
home.contactDescription: Placeholder for email, WeChat, or a contact form.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page may have moved, or the URL may be incorrect.

magicCursor.title: Magic Cursor
magicCursor.description: Switch between cursor effects and tune parameters in real time.
magicCursor.blendBackgroundHelp: blendBackground (optional, rgba / leave empty for library default)
magicCursor.magneticHelp: Elements matching this selector in the preview area will be attracted; default is
magicCursor.itemColorLabel: itemColor (preview magnetic block, empty uses theme primary)

imageToUi.title: Image to UI
imageToUi.stepOneDescription: Upload or choose a sample image, extract dominant colors, and pick three colors for the interface rendering step.
imageToUi.stepTwoDescription: Review the current image and three color roles, inspect the full preview, or go back to edit.
imageToUi.sourceDescription: Upload an image or choose one sample from the compact list.
imageToUi.previewDescription: After selecting an image, the complete picture is shown here with contain sizing.
imageToUi.paletteDescription: Extract dominant colors by pixel share, then choose three colors to enter the rendering step.
imageToUi.uploadHelp: Previewed only in your browser. Nothing is uploaded or saved to the server.
imageToUi.paletteEmpty: Select an image to show the palette and color controls.
imageToUi.paletteInsufficient: The current image has fewer than {count} selectable colors. Choose an image with richer contrast.
imageToUi.selectionLimit: You can select up to 3 colors. Deselect a color before choosing another.
imageToUi.extractionError: Unable to extract a palette from this image. Try another image or upload it again.
imageToUi.summaryDescription: Image, three colors, and derived tokens (read-only).
imageToUi.renderDescription: Dashboard and marketing previews under a scoped theme.

roleRationales.surfaceLowSaturation: Bright and low-saturation, suitable for backgrounds and surface bases
roleRationales.surfaceBrighter: Relatively brighter, suitable for backgrounds and surface hierarchy
roleRationales.surfaceCalm: Lower saturation and calmer, suitable for surfaces and muted areas
roleRationales.surfaceDefault: Best surface fit, suitable for backgrounds and card bases
roleRationales.actionVivid: Vivid with {contrast} against the surface base, suitable for primary actions and focus color
roleRationales.actionDefault: {contrast} against the surface base, suitable for primary actions and focus color
roleRationales.supportNeutral: Mid-tone neutral, suitable for borders, inputs, and soft emphasis
roleRationales.supportSecondary: Mid-tone support color, suitable for secondary UI and soft emphasis
roleRationales.supportMuted: Leans neutral, suitable for borders and subtle hierarchy
roleRationales.supportDefault: Best support fit, suitable for secondary interface elements

great-wave.title: The Great Wave off Kanagawa
great-wave.description: Blue and white contrast with subtle gradients, useful for checking whether white and near-white colors enter the palette.

starry-night.title: The Starry Night
starry-night.description: Deep blue night sky and swirling brushwork, useful for testing high-contrast dark color extraction.

impression-sunrise.title: Impression, Sunrise
impression-sunrise.description: Misty morning light with orange-blue contrast, useful for separating muted atmospheric colors from accents.

water-lilies.title: Water Lilies
water-lilies.description: Large areas of similar hues, useful for testing multiple swatches and subtle transitions.

school-athens.title: The School of Athens
school-athens.description: Classical mural depth and earth tones, useful for stable dominant colors in a dense figure scene.

girl-pearl.title: Girl with a Pearl Earring
girl-pearl.description: Soft skin tones against a dark background, useful for observing palette balance across light and dark areas.

almond-blossom.title: Almond Blossom
almond-blossom.description: Pale blue ground and pink-white blossoms, useful for extracting airy, bright surface colors.

mont-sainte-victoire.title: Mont Sainte-Victoire
mont-sainte-victoire.description: Geometric mountain shapes and sky blocks, useful for distinguishing close cool and warm grays.

sunday-grande-jatte.title: A Sunday on La Grande Jatte
sunday-grande-jatte.description: Pointillist saturated grass and water, useful for observing dominant color order across adjacent blocks.

harmony-red.title: Harmony in Red
harmony-red.description: Dominant reds and decorative patterns, useful for observing palette variation inside one hue family.

calling-saint-matthew.title: The Calling of Saint Matthew
calling-saint-matthew.description: Strong chiaroscuro and local highlights, useful for testing action color extraction in dark scenes.

gleaners.title: The Gleaners
gleaners.description: Warm fields and silhouetted figures, useful for low-saturation natural palettes.

wanderer-fog.title: Wanderer above the Sea of Fog
wanderer-fog.description: Cool gray fog and a dark figure, useful for testing three-color selection in a minimal palette.

gauguin-where.title: Where Do We Come From?
gauguin-where.description: Tropical saturated color blocks, useful for testing swatch selection from a rich palette.

preview.subtitle: Scoped theme preview generated from selected image colors
preview.watchDescription: Expansion risk is concentrated in enterprise renewals.
preview.documentsDescription: Executive status, customer pipeline, and expansion momentum.
preview.revenueTrend: Revenue and expansion trend for the last 6 months.
preview.segmentDescription: Active and risk volume by segment.
preview.incidentDescription: API latency remains above SLO in APAC. Keep mitigation playbook v2 active until traffic normalizes.
preview.responseDescription: On-call engineers are actively watching APAC latency.
preview.detailsTooltip: Escalation owner, support lead, and infra SRE are assigned.
preview.accentDescription: Trigger a focused outreach campaign for churn-risk accounts this week.
preview.customerPipelineDescription: Prioritized accounts for this week's operators.
preview.upgradeDescription: You are currently on the free plan. Upgrade to the pro plan to get access to all features.
preview.landingHeadline: Keep every expansion motion on track.
preview.landingDescription: A branded workspace for teams that need sharper account visibility, faster playbooks, and calmer executive reporting.
